title: ilex aquifolium f. ferox
intro: Ilex aquifolium f. ferox, also known as the Holly Blue or Dwarf Holly, is a compact, evergreen shrub that is a variant of the common holly plant (Ilex aquifolium). Traditionally, the leaves and berries of the Ilex aquifolium f. ferox plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, relieve joint pain, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. The leaves of the Ilex aquifolium f. ferox plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
